proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0.gcd(x1) = Nat.1 = x0.coprime(x1) }(a, n)

goal: exists(k0: Int, k1: Int) { k0 * Int.from_nat(a) + k1 * Int.from_nat(n) = Int.from_nat(a.gcd(n)) }
proof: exists(k0: Int, k1: Int) { Int.from_nat(a.gcd(n)) = k0 * Int.from_nat(a) + k1 * Int.from_nat(n) }
function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { x0 - (x0 + x1) = -x1 }(x * Int.from_nat(a), y * Int.from_nat(n))
function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(-y, Int.from_nat(n))
function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { exists(k0: Int) { k0 * x0 = x1 } = x0.divides(x1) }(Int.from_nat(n), x * Int.from_nat(a) - 1)
not exists(k0: Int) { k0 * Int.from_nat(n) = x * Int.from_nat(a) - 1 }
function(x0: Int) { x * Int.from_nat(a) - 1 != x0 * Int.from_nat(n) }(-y)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { Int.from_nat(x0).divides(x1 - x2) = int_mod_rel(x0, x1, x2) }(n, x * Int.from_nat(a), 1)
function(x0: Int) { not int_mod_rel(n, x0 * Int.from_nat(a), 1) }(x)
